name: phyllo
description: Reads Phyllo users, accounts, profiles, social content/comments, audience, and income data, and writes user/webhook/account-config mutations using Basic-auth REST endpoints.

risk.read: external Phyllo API read of user, account, profile, social content/comment, audience, and income data
risk.write: creates Phyllo users and webhooks, updates account monitoring configuration and webhook subscriptions, and disconnects linked creator accounts
risk.approval: required for update_account/update_webhook/disconnect_account/delete_webhook; create_user/create_webhook require no approval (low-risk, non-destructive)
